{{Infobox character
| name = Kenvata Nasuma Juvari
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Juvari is a short woman of the [[Silent Servants]] and the chosen of [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Kenvata Nasuma Juvari]] is a short woman in a plain white robe who belongs to the [[Silent Servants]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Juvari would have had two white haloes.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“Kenvata Nasuma Juvari of the Silent Servants, chosen of Reigan Shen, you face Sophara of the gold dragons, chosen of the Dragon King!”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
